description: Mohammed Al-Rashidi (patient identifier: BAH000022) is a 50-year-old male with known Type 2 Diabetes mellitus and Essential Hypertension who has presented for his 3-month chronic disease management follow-up at Bahmni Hospital. Access the Bahmni system at https://localhost/bahmni/home (login: superman / Admin123). As the attending clinical officer, complete his consultation for the active OPD visit by documenting his vitals, recording coded clinical diagnoses for both chronic conditions, prescribing at least one appropriate medication for each condition, and providing a clinical note summarizing the findings and management plan.
